summary: Suraj Navodaya App - a web app deployed on Internet Computer with ads support. User wants changes to the login section.

existing_features.title: Redesign the login/authentication section of the app with an improved visual layout. Update the Internet Identity login UI to feature a more prominent, visually appealing login button with clear school branding (maroon and gold theme). Add a welcoming title, a brief description of the app, and the school logo/name above the login button. Ensure the login area is centered and styled consistently with the overall Suraj Navodaya App theme.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change/update the login section of the app
